name: 林隐
base_prompt: 25yo female, short black hair, sharp eyes, scar left brow, slim athletic build 170cm

variants.calm: straight posture, lips pressed, focused gaze, hands relaxed
variants.angry: gritting teeth, clenched fist, deep frown, aggressive stance
variants.sad: teary eyes, hunched shoulders, trembling lips, rain on face
variants.determined: jaw set, eyes blazing, fist raised, leaning forward
variants.exhausted: sweating, panting, half-lidded eyes, slumped posture

negative_base: smiling, bright, sunny, cartoon, deformed, extra fingers, bad anatomy
costume_default: dark tactical jacket, black cargo pants, combat boots
